# Handcrafted

**Path:** `global_descriptor/handcrafted`

Global descriptors constructed by deterministic geometric, projection, histogram, or signal-processing rules.

## Scope

**Include:** Scan Context family; M2DP; RING family

**Exclude:** descriptors trained end-to-end
